notes.f1: Death 23 December 1883 recovered exactly on K87G-T89 and sourced (S1, S2); the Death fact itself carries no place, but the death-place question is answered by the burial at Stavanger (f2).
notes.f2: Burial 31 December 1883 at Stavanger, Rogaland, Norway recovered exactly and sourced. proof_quality=2: systematic search but single evidence unit (both burial indexes are the same event) → single-source corroboration; probable tier appropriate.
